title: The Wife of Monte Cristo
writer: Alexandre Dumas, Dorcas Cochran, Edgar G. Ulmer
actors: John Loder, Lenore Aubert, Fritz Kortner
plot: Edmund Dantes (Martin Kosleck), The Count of Monte Cristo, rides again in 1832, this time accompanied by (or stood in for) his countess wife, Haydee (Lenore Aubert. He is out for vengeance (using a mask and working as "The Avenger...
